messages.content: # Turning on your signals and cannot hear the signal sound? Follow this guide!

## Step 1
> [Click here to download the **Blinker sound app**](https://www.racedepartment.com/downloads/blinker-sound-app.64886/)
## Step 2
> Drag & Drop into Content Manager and install.
## [Click here for a demo video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PYAGt0CFNh8)
